content.body: i thought we decided not to do that
decided not to break the spec into multiple documents, or decided not to generate a single file?
@ljharb:matrix.org We did not decide whether they would be separate source files.
content.formatted_body: @ljharb We did not decide whether they would be separate source files.

content.body: so when's that going to be decided
because I'll have to change ecmaspeak if it's multiple files
i thought we did - it wasn’t just about the built representation that we discussed, we also talked about the source files.
(I assume a ton of tools will need to adapt if the source files are split - i have a few too)
I had understood that the previous editors group already decided that Temporal would be merged as separate files
We definitely *wanted* to, but it wasn't a "decision" because we may run into issues like the ones we've all been pointing out
i also continue to maintain that something that big isn't the sole purview of the editor's group
